patient_summary: Olivia, female DOB 05/05/1952 (age 73). Encounter on 06/30/2023 (Orders Only) at Singing River Gulfport with documented visit diagnoses: Mixed dyslipidemia (Primary), Essential hypertension (benign), Postoperative anemia, Leg pain, and Unspecified anemia. Laboratory testing performed 07/03/2023 at SINGING RIVER GULFPORT HOSPITAL LAB includes abnormal lipid panel (Triglycerides 158 (H); VLDL 32 (H); LDL Calculated 62; Non HDL Chol. 94), iron studies (Iron 41 (L); Iron Saturation 15 (L); TIBC 279), ferritin 266.8 (H), basic metabolic panel components, eGFR CKD-EPI 58 (L), and TSH Ultra Sensitive 1.320. Social history: former smoker (quit 1991), no current alcohol use. Functional status entries note difficulty walking or climbing stairs (Yes 06/14/2023). Primary care: Hand, Hoyet A, MD (PCP). Upcoming appointments are listed for 04/19/2024 through 11/26/2024. All items sourced from the Singing River Health System progress note and accompanying results (pages 1-12).
